title: WIP: Automatic PR Labeling + Merge blocking

comments.body:
Lovely...there's no way to test adding a new action b/c github only runs already committed actions :frowning_face: 

I'll need to make a temporary testing branch to verify this PR's changes actually function...

Closing as this cannot work with Github Actions due to the design of it's permissions system.  The only possibility is to use a periodic/schedule-based bot.  Ref discussion here: https://github.com/actions/labeler/issues/12#issuecomment-581149070
